DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS IN DEPARTMENT 302 FILED BEFORE JUNE 1, 2020 ARE OFF CALENDAR PURSUANT TO THE COURT'S GENERAL ORDERS. TO RE-SCHEDULE THE HEARING, PLEASE REFER TO THE PUBLIC NOTICE TO RESTORE SERVICES ISSUED ON MAY 27, 2020 AVAILABLE ON THE COURT'S WEBSITE AT HTTPS://SFSUPERIORCOURT.ORG/. (302/EPS)

DISCOVERY 302, "IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS CURRENTLY CALENDARED IN DEPARTMENTS 301/302 ARE HEREBY VACATED. WHEN THE COURT RESUMES NORMAL OPERATIONS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL ANNOUNCE PROCEDURES FOR SETTING HEARING DATES FOR THOSE CASES WHICH HAVE BEEN FULLY BRIEFED. OPPOSITIONS WILL BE DUE BASED ON THE RESCHEDULED HEARING DATE, BUT NOTHING PRECLUDES A PARTY FROM FILING AN OPPOSITION EARLIER." (302)

DECLARATION OF H. ANN LIROFF IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION AND MOTION TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ADMITTED (TRANSACTION ID # 65678605) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE ARC SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 65733722) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE ARC SAN FRANCISCO

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT THE ARC SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION AND TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ADMITTED: DEFENDANT'S UNOPPOSED MOTION REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO SIT FOR HIS DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF WILL APPEAR WITHIN THE NEXT FOURTEEN DAYS, AT A TIME AND PLACE AGREED TO WITH DEFENDANT, TO ALLOW HIS DEPOSITION TO BE TAKEN. DEFENDANT'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO HAVE ITS REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION DEEMED ADMITTED IS DENIED IN PART AND GRANTED IN PART AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO SERVE WITHOUT OBJECTION CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION WITHIN FOURTEEN (14) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO DO SO, ALL REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION WILL BE DEEMED ADMITTED FOR ALL PURPOSES IN THIS LITIGATION. NO SANCTIONS WERE REQUESTED AND NONE WITH BE IMPOSED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-13-2020 Dismissal - No Appearance

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Deposition And To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted
Off Calendar Jul-07-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT THE ARC SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Deposition And To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted:

DEFENDANT'S UNOPPOSED MOTION REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO SIT FOR HIS DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF WILL APPEAR WITHIN THE NEXT FOURTEEN DAYS, AT A TIME AND PLACE AGREED TO WITH DEFENDANT, TO ALLOW HIS DEPOSITION TO BE TAKEN. DEFENDANT'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO HAVE ITS REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION DEEMED ADMITTED IS DENIED IN PART AND GRANTED IN PART AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO SERVE WITHOUT OBJECTION CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION WITHIN FOURTEEN (14) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO DO SO, ALL REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION WILL BE DEEMED ADMITTED FOR ALL PURPOSES IN THIS LITIGATION. NO SANCTIONS WERE REQUESTED AND NONE WITH BE IMPOSED.

order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Deposition And To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted
Off Calendar Apr-14-2020 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-06-2019 Continued To Jul-13-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Dec-05-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christina E. Begakis, Esq. of ABRAMSON LABOR GROUP, T:213.493.69300, counsel for plaintiff, and moving party, by Court Call;
H. Ann Liroff, Esq. of FARBSTEIN & BLACKMAN, T:650.554.6200, counsel for defendant;
No appearance by plaintiff.

RULING: Hearing held. There being no objection, the Court ruled as follows:

CHRISTINA E. BEGAKIS, ESQ.'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for Johannz Evangelista is granted.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
